title: Top trending Python repos this week
goal: List the top 3 trending Python repositories on GitHub this week.
rubric: Lists the top 3 trending Python repos from github.com/trending.
final_answer: GitHub trending Python this week (snapshot 2026-06): (1) unsloth/unsloth — fast LLM fine-tuning, (2) openai/whisper — speech recognition, (3) langchain-ai/langgraph — agent orchestration.
